DescribeRouteTables.routeTableId: Route table ID (mutually exclusive with vpcId)

CreateRouteRule.desc: Create a route rule in a route table
CreateRouteRule.nexthopId: Next hop ID (required for single-path routes)
CreateRouteRule.nextHopList: List of next hops for multi-path routes

DescribeRouteRules.desc: List route rules for a route table or VPC
DescribeRouteRules.routeTableId: Route table ID (mutually exclusive with vpcId)

UpdateRouteRule.desc: Update a route rule (single-path routes only)
UpdateRouteRule.routeRuleId: ID of the route rule to update

DeleteRouteRule.routeRuleId: ID of the route rule to delete

SwitchRouteHA.desc: Switch primary to backup in a multi-path HA route
